title: Horror sounds
description: This mod adds 15 Horror voices/sounds which play every 10-18 minutes!
body:
## This mod adds 15 Horror voices/sounds which play every 10-18 minutes!
 
⚠️This addon was **NOT** fully tested in **Multiplayer** there can be some **bugs**, but in Singleplayer everything works perfect👌 ⚠️

This mod is a great choice to build up tension to your minecraft world!
This addon contains 15 diffrent Sounds/Voices which will play from 10-18 minutes, and there is a 1/15 chance to get a not so scary jumpscare

There is a good portion of sounds from minecraft itself in this mod, but they are changed or have a lower pitch so it's not too stale. I think there is 3-5 voice lines and a couple impact sounds and a rare not that scary jumpscare

### **I strongly recommend using this mod with other horror mods.**
